title: Self Introduction 自我介绍
scene: 新学期开学，一个新同学在班上做自我介绍。

lines.en: Class, we have a new student today. Please welcome Jack.
lines.zh: 同学们，今天我们有一位新同学。请欢迎杰克。

lines.en: Hello, everyone! My name is Jack Brown.
I'm eleven years old. I come from Beijing.
lines.zh: 我十一岁了。我来自北京。

lines.en: I like playing basketball and reading books.
That's great, Jack. What's your favorite subject?
lines.zh: 太好了，杰克。你最喜欢什么科目？

lines.en: My favorite subject is English. I love learning new words.
lines.zh: 我最喜欢的科目是英语。我喜欢学新单词。

lines.en: Wonderful! Do you have any brothers or sisters?
lines.zh: 太棒了！你有兄弟姐妹吗？

lines.en: Yes, I have a younger sister. She is eight years old.
lines.zh: 有的，我有一个妹妹。她八岁了。

lines.en: We're happy to have you in our class, Jack.
lines.zh: 杰克，很高兴你来到我们班。

lines.en: Thank you, Ms. Lee. I hope we can be good friends!
lines.zh: 谢谢您，李老师。希望我们能成为好朋友！
